improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your operations. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners, traders, and professionals. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI-Powered Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Professional trade and business support powered by Claude. Try Gideon free today.">
improvements.rationale: A well-crafted meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the value proposition. Open Graph tags ensure the page displays correctly when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, and other platforms where business professionals discover tools. The copy highlights key features (instant answers, voice chat, free trial) without overpromising, building trust with the target audience.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a powerful workspace built for professionals. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clearly states what it is, reducing confusion. The subheading highlights the three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the risk-free trial with 'no card required' to lower friction and boost conversions. Copy stays factual and within stated context.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Memberships start from just US$2 per day, with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and professional-grade assistance whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free trial to paid membership, it reduces uncertainty, sets expectations, and positions the upgrade as a value-add rather than a restriction. Including pricing reinforces affordability and transparency, building trust with prospective members.
